Index

Modules: dimslash, dimslash/api.

API symbols

`$`:
  • api: proc `$`(value: ApplicationId | InteractionId | MessageId | UserId | GuildId | ChannelId | RoleId | AttachmentId): string
`==`:
  • api: proc `==`(left, right: ApplicationId): bool
  • api: proc `==`(left, right: AttachmentId): bool
  • api: proc `==`(left, right: ChannelId): bool
  • api: proc `==`(left, right: GuildId): bool

  • api: proc `==`(left, right: MessageId): bool
  • api: proc `==`(left, right: RoleId): bool
  • api: proc `==`(left, right: UserId): bool
